fields.label: Webhook URL
fields.description: The bot endpoint that receives ticket status notifications (e.g. https://example.trycloudflare.com/erp/ticket-status)

fields.label: Webhook API Key
fields.description: The x-api-key header value for authenticating with the bot

fields.label: Webhook Enabled
fields.description: Uncheck to temporarily disable webhook notifications without removing the URL

fields.label: Default Language
fields.description: Default language for bot messages (ISO 639-1 code)

fields.label: Notes
fields.description: Internal notes about the bot configuration

fields.label: Embeddings Enabled
fields.description: Vectorize uploaded documents so the bot can search them semantically

fields.label: OpenAI API Key
fields.description: Used to generate document and query embeddings

fields.label: Embedding Model
fields.description: OpenAI embeddings model (documents must be reindexed after changing it)
